case_title: MASANGCAY, ROBERT et al VS GALLOFIN, RUMELLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY MASANGCAY, ROBERT MASANGCAY'S FINE JEWELRY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLOFIN, RUMELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
